positive: A visually stunning, high-contrast celestial landscape illustration suitable for apparel printing. The design features a stylized composition of interlocking mountain ranges, crescent moons, and flowing constellations, arranged in a balanced, central mandala pattern. Style should be sophisticated, clean line art with strong silhouettes, reminiscent of modern esoteric graphic design. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, charcoal black, muted teal, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, designed with perfect edges and clean negative space, suitable for screen-printing transfer on fabric.
